title: Making Hydrogen With Magnets
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
the paper this is based on is Direct magnetic enhancement of electrocatalytic water oxidation in alkaline media - DOI:10.1038/s41560-019-0404-4
the video showing construction of the cell is https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cNTMWhMWQAA
